Who We Are

A simple introduction to Ahmad Textile.

Ahmad Textile supplies fabric and finished products for household, hospitality, healthcare, garment and protective wear use — from grey/loomstate to bleached, dyed and printed, in a wide range of blends and weaves.

This page is an introduction to what we offer. Beyond the range shown here, we're happy to discuss any construction to your specification — reach out and tell us what you need.

Beyond Fabric

Apparel & Made-Ups

Once the fabric is right, we can coordinate it through to a finished, ready-to-ship product — garments, home linens, and made-ups cut and sewn to spec.

01 — MADE-UPS

Home & Bath Made-Ups

Finished home textiles cut, sewn and packed to your specification — ready for retail or hospitality use.

  • Bedsheets, pillow covers & duvet sets
  • Towels & bath linen
  • Kitchen & table linen
02 — APPAREL

Apparel & Garments

Cut-and-sew coordination for garments, from casual wear to uniforms — matched to the fabric quality your order needs.

  • Cut-and-sew garment coordination
  • Workwear & protective clothing
  • Casual & uniform apparel
Special Fabric

Specialty & Technical Weaves

Beyond standard qualities, we source fabric built for a specific job — premium handle, technical performance, or a look that's harder to find.

01 — PREMIUM WEAVES

Premium & Decorative Weaves

Jacquard, dobby and seersucker constructions with a richer hand-feel — for buyers who need a fabric that stands out.

  • Jacquard & dobby patterning
  • Sateen & yarn-dyed finishes
  • Premium hand-feel & drape
02 — TECHNICAL FABRIC

Technical & Performance Fabric

Flame-retardant, stretch and blended constructions built for demanding end use, from protective wear to activewear.

  • Flame-retardant treatments
  • Stretch & elasthane blends
  • Performance & protective-wear grade
How We Work

From inquiry to dispatch.

Every order moves through the same coordinated process, whether it's a single fabric quality or a full made-up program.

01

Inquiry & Specification

You share the fabric or product spec — width, count, finish, blend, quantity — and we confirm feasibility.

02

Sourcing & Loom Matching

We match the order to the right loom and mill from our network — power, auto, sulzer or airjet.

03

Processing & Finishing

Bleaching, dyeing or printing is coordinated to your approved sample, finished to PFD, PFP or PFGD stage.

04

Quality Grading

Every lot is inspected and graded before it's approved for dispatch — see our full Quality Control process below.

05

Dispatch & Delivery

Packed and documented, with full traceability back to the original order and source lot.

View Processing Capabilities in Detail →
Quality Control

Checked at every stage, not just at the end.

GR
Greige Inspection
Raw fabric checked for weave density, width and construction before finishing.
PR
Process Check
Dye batches and print runs matched against approved lab dips and strike-off samples.
FN
Finish Testing
GSM, shrinkage and colorfastness verified against the buyer's approved specification.
LD
Lot Grading
Every roll graded before dispatch, with defects logged and traceable to source.

Tell us what you need.

Share your fabric specification — width, count, finish, blend — and we'll get back to you.
